role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on the Hangul script and language identification.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and urban density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific species (Ginkgo, Pine) and their regional prevalence.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure, paving, and signage standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like construction fencing styles and street furniture.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified the definitive linguistic marker (Hangul) to disambiguate the region and country.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Hangul characters on the stone monument are clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Yellow ginkgo leaves and hilly terrain match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Ginkgo and pine species are present.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Green fencing and hexagonal pavers are visible.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Construction fencing and stair railings match the description.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly identified South Korea as the final winner.
